---
title: "02. 动态变易与循环"
subtitle: "Dynamic Change and Cyclic Completion"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 2
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How 屯、蒙、剥、复、夬、姤、既济、未济 map beginning, return, and terminal oscillation onto golden-mean dynamics, fold attractors, and period-2 structure."
---

**Hexagrams:** 屯(3), 蒙(4), 剥(23), 复(24), 夬(43), 姤(44), 既济(63), 未济(64)  
**Omega Directions:** `dynamical systems`, `golden-mean shift`, `fold operator`

{{< include articles/category_02_dynamic_change_cyclic_completion.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## NotebookLM Slides

[Download Slides (PDF)](../../media/cultural/i-ching/category_02_dynamic_change_cyclic_completion_slides.pdf)


## Infographic

![category_02_dynamic_change_cyclic_completion Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_dynamic_change_cyclic_completion_infographic.png)

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_dynamic_change_cyclic_completion_video.mp4 >}}

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_dynamic_change_cyclic_completion_infographic.png)
